title: Murder Drones: Solver Corruption
description: This mod adds the Absolute Solver abilites, as well as Disassembly Drone items and abilites (with the corrosponding armors)
body:
This mod adds the Absolute Solver abilites, as well as Disassembly Drone items and abilites (with the corrosponding armors)

Current Solver abilities are:

Telekinesis
Knife throw (being remade)
Teleportation (being remade but works)
[NULL] explosion item. (Extemely powerful)

The mod also adds facial expressions and visors as well!

 
This mod **requires** the Player Animator mod _and_ Geckolib Mod! **IT WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT THEM!**
